---
title: "Jacob Johnson"
description-meta: "Personal Academic Website for Jacob Johnson"
image: "files/images/JacobJohnson.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
sidebar: true
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dbN-_3QAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:jajohnsonstats@gmail.com   
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/jajohnsonstats
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-johnson-179391251/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-3797-0812
      target: _blank
    - icon: sun
      text: Katzfuss Group
      href: https://sites.google.com/view/katzfuss/group
      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a second year PhD student at the [University of Wisconsin – Madison](https://stat.wisc.edu/). My research is focused on finding new methods in Bayesian Machine Learning, Spatial Statistics, Gaussian Processes, and Uncertainty Quantification, specifically with applications in climate and environmental science.



Check [README.md](https://github.com/drganghe/quarto-academic-website-template/blob/main/README.md) for more detailed instructions.

## Experience

- Researcher, Univerisity

## Education

- PhD, Univerisity

:::


<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
